author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Wholesome Direct 2026 - Summer Game Showcase
Get ready for the latest Wholesome Direct digital showcase on Saturday, June 6, 2026 starting at 9 AM PT, 12PM ET. 

Returning for its seventh iteration, Wholesome Direct is back and ready to highlight the latest up-and-coming titles for players looking for uplifting, joyful, and hopeful games. The Wholesome Games team has carefully curated a selection of 50+ emotionally resonant titles with news including world premieres, demo announcements, and many more surprises from studios and publishers of all sizes. This year's Wholesome Direct will include news and surprises from amazing developers including Frontier, NPC Studio, Stray Fawn Studio, Spry Fox, and many more, delivered by returning host and Wholesome Games organizer Jenny Windom and a variety of guest co-hosts specializing in the wholesome and cozy niche including Gab Smolders, Knimbley, NintenTalk, and more.

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
That’s No Moon’s Crossfire Aims To Evolve Cover Shooters
Imagine the tension found in extractions shooters, but in a narrative cover based game.

Crossfire is going to be a divisive game. The team behind it knows that and they're okay with it. And honestly, we're okay with it too. Because underneath that divisiveness, there is the potential to push the genre forward in a way that very few others are trying to do these days.

#sgf #crossfire #thatsnomoon

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Control Resonant Was 7 Years In The Making
We speak with the Creative Director Mikael Kasurinen and Art Director Elmeri Raitanen about the seven year development of Control Resonant.

#sgf #controlresonant #remedy

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Control Resonant Is Proving Remedy Can Do More Than Shooters
If you watch the latest Control Resonant gameplay footage, you'll see a game that takes the fascinating supernatural world of Control and melds it with the exhilarating and fast-paced melee combat of a character-action game. 

It's new territory for Remedy Entertainment, a studio that has primarily made games where protagonists shoot guns, but that genre experience wasn't evident in what I played. The combat felt satisfying and weighty, and the dynamic between unique weapons and powers created a thrilling gameplay loop.

#controlresonant #control #remedy #gaming #gameplay #summergamefest 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
VIRTUA FIGHTER CROSSROADS - Cielo Story Cinematics Trailer
VIRTUA FIGHTER CROSSROADS, the all-new title in the VIRTUA FIGHTER series.
This is the story trailer for one of the game's protagonists, Cielo.

A city you've never seen
A story you've never heard
A totally new Virtua Fighter

Experience a rich single-player adventure, immersive narrative-driven gameplay, and the intense head-to-head battles the series is known for.

Neither a remake nor a nostalgia piece, VIRTUA FIGHTER CROSSROADS is a complete reinvention of the franchise. Stay tuned for a bold new era of VIRTUA FIGHTER.

"Legacy"
Rap Vocals & Lyrics by El Gran Nael
Composed & Arranged by Yasuyuki Nagata
Rap Vocals Produced by Yuki Kanesaka

"Vilasapara"
Vocals by Yosh (Survive Said The Prophet)
Lyrics by nana hatori
Composed & Arranged by Makoto Tokuyama

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Summer Game Fest 2026 BIGGEST Announcements
From a Stelar Blade sequel to Final Fantasy VII Revelation, here are the biggest announcements for the Summer Game Fest kick off presentation.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Resident Evil Veronica - Official 4K Announcement Trailer
Survive the Deranged Terror

Resident Evil Veronica is a remake of 2000's Resident Evil Code: Veronica.

This new title preserves the essence of the original game, while introducing modernized gameplay, a reimagined storyline, and vividly detailed graphics.

In 2027, madness and intrigue, love and hate all combine to create a chilling new entry in survival horror.

#residentevil #reidentevilveronica #codeveronica #codeveronicaremake #gaming #summergamefest

https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Stellar Blade: BLOOD RAIN | Official Reveal Trailer
Stellar Blade: BLOOD RAIN is the next chapter in the acclaimed action-adventure franchise from SHIFT UP. BLOOD RAIN will continue the story beyond the events of the first game and introduce a new protagonist, Evie.

This trailer was captured entirely in-game on PC. The footage is from a game currently in development and is subject to change.
